title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for prompting Claude Code derived from studying Anthropic engineers' actual practices: prompt skills not raw capability, recognize skills exceed basic prompts, build composable over custom skills, and allow skills to improve across sessions. The framework emphasizes reusable, modular patterns over ad-hoc prompting.
